name: Ezo Pmp → Dose Volume
description: Use this action in an [automations](https://esphome.io/automations) to have the peristaltic pump dose an specific volume (in milliliters) at the [Maximum Flow Rate](https://esphome.io/components/ezo_pmp#ezo_pmp-max_flow_rate_sensor). If the volume is negative the pump will run backwards.

config_entries.label: Volume
config_entries.description: The volume to dose in milliliters. If negative, pump will run in reverse.
